infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: ReliefLink uses your location when you choose to share it during an emergency.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: ReliefLink may use your location in the background only when you enable related features.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: ReliefLink uses your location when you choose to share it during an emergency.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: ReliefLink may use your location when you enable related safety features.
